tasks.label: SCons: build debug target
tasks.command: scons build_dir=scons-build-template_debug target=template_debug debug_symbols=yes && tree bin

tasks.label: SCons: build release target
tasks.command: scons build_dir=scons-build-template_release target=template_release debug_symbols=no && tree bin

tasks.label: SCons: clean debug target
tasks.command: scons --clean --dry-run build_dir=scons-build-template_debug target=template_debug debug_symbols=yes 2>&1 | rg '^Removed bin/' | sed 's/^Removed //' | xargs -r rm -f && tree bin

tasks.label: SCons: clean release target
tasks.command: scons --clean --dry-run build_dir=scons-build-template_release target=template_release debug_symbols=no 2>&1 | rg '^Removed bin/' | sed 's/^Removed //' | xargs -r rm -f && tree bin
